message:
test(pt-core): add automation mode tests for robot/shadow/dry-run flags

Implements comprehensive test coverage for CLI automation modes:
- Robot mode: no prompts, non-interactive operation
- Shadow mode: full pipeline without execution
- Dry-run mode: plan computation only
- Combined mode tests (robot+shadow, etc.)
- Stdin/TTY handling tests for CI/CD environments
- Safety gate verification in automation contexts

All 30 tests pass. Closes bead process_triage-y3ao.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
